title: Marriage Maze
description: Host Bert Schnick welcomes couples who seem to have made a hash of their marriage and cooked their goose. Can they be a happy couple or will they need treatment?
quote: Come up here and let’s feel you!
altHero: host Bert Schnick, in a bright orange suit with slick black hair and sunglasses
alt1: Bert on stage with two contestants
alt2: woman contestant thinking, a timer on screen at 16 seconds
alt3: man contestant looking concerned, a timer on screen at 11 seconds
